name: Strawberry Rhubarb Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sliced fresh or frozen rhubarb, 1 inch pieces
1 cup butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine rhubarb, strawberries and lemon juice. Cover and cook over medium heat about 5 minutes.
2. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a small bowl, stir into the saucepan mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Beat buttermilk, eggs and vanilla; stir into the crumb mixture.
5. Spread half the batter evenly into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
6. Carefully spread filling on top of the batter.
7. Drop remaining batter by tablespoonfuls over the filling.
8. For topping: melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat, stir in flour and sugar until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Sprinkle over the batter.
9. Lay foil on the lower rack to catch any juicy fruit spillovers.
10. Place the coffee cake on the middle rack and bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
11. Cool in the pan, then cut into squares. Makes 16-20 servings.
